name: After-Hours Auto-Reply
description: Auto-replies with a configurable away/closing message to messages received outside business hours.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis <yudhi@rmyndharis.com>

schedule.title: Weekly schedule (JSON)
schedule.description: Object mapping mon..sun to "HH:MM-HH:MM" or null (closed), e.g. {"mon":"09:00-17:00","sat":"09:00-13:00","sun":null}.

timezone.title: IANA timezone
timezone.description: e.g. Asia/Jakarta. The schedule is interpreted in this timezone.

awayMessage.title: After-hours reply
awayMessage.description: Sent when a message arrives outside business hours.

cooldownSec.title: Cooldown (seconds per chat)
cooldownSec.description: Minimum seconds between after-hours replies to the same chat. 0 = reply every time.
